subject: Style guide policy
statement: Lumen Press uses sentence-case headings throughout all publications. This was decided at the 2026 Q1 editorial review and applies to both print and digital output.

subject: Body font stack preference
statement: The preferred body font for Lumen Press publications is Garamond Premier Pro, falling back to any oldstyle serif. This preference was validated against the brand guidelines document dated 2026-02-01.

subject: Draft print run estimate Q2 2026
statement: Provisional estimate of 3000 copies for the Q2 anthology. This figure is a candidate pending confirmation from the distribution partner.
notes: Proposed via memory_propose; awaiting distribution partner confirmation before promotion.

subject: Colophon placement lesson
statement: Placing the colophon on the verso of the last page of body text reduces reader confusion compared to placing it on a separate final page. Observed across three 2025 titles.
